# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: Custom User Authentication
Description: Handles user registration and login authentication with secure password hashing and verification.
Version: 1.0.0
Author: ChatGPT
*/

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class Custom_User_Authentication_Plugin {
    const TABLE_SUFFIX = 'custom_auth_users';
    const NONCE_ACTION = 'custom_auth_nonce_action';
    const NONCE_NAME = 'custom_auth_nonce';

    public function __construct() {
        register_activation_hook(__FILE__, array($this, 'activate'));
        add_shortcode('custom_auth_register', array($this, 'render_register_form'));
        add_shortcode('custom_auth_login', array($this, 'render_login_form'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'handle_forms'));
        add_action('admin_post_nopriv_custom_auth_logout', array($this, 'handle_logout'));
        add_action('admin_post_custom_auth_logout', array($this, 'handle_logout'));
    }

    public function table_name() {
        global $wpdb;
        return $wpdb->prefix . self::TABLE_SUFFIX;
    }

    public function activate() {
        global $wpdb;

        $table_name = $this->table_name();
        $charset_collate = $wpdb->get_charset_collate();

        require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/upgrade.php';

        $sql = "CREATE TABLE {$table_name} (
            id BIGINT(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            user_login VARCHAR(60) NOT NULL,
            user_email VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
            user_pass TEXT NOT NULL,
            created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            PRIMARY KEY  (id),
            UNIQUE KEY user_login (user_login),
            UNIQUE KEY user_email (user_email)
        ) {$charset_collate};";

        dbDelta($sql);
    }

    public function render_register_form() {
        if (is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<p>You are already logged in.</p>';
        }

        $message = isset($_GET['custom_auth_msg']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['custom_auth_msg'])) : '';
        $output = '';

        if ($message) {
            $output .= '<p>' . esc_html($message) . '</p>';
        }

        $output .= '<form method="post">
            <p><label>Username<br><input type="text" name="custom_auth_username" required></label></p>
            <p><label>Email<br><input type="email" name="custom_auth_email" required></label></p>
            <p><label>Password<br><input type="password" name="custom_auth_password" required></label></p>
            <p><label>Confirm Password<br><input type="password" name="custom_auth_password_confirm" required></label></p>
            <p>' . wp_nonce_field(self::NONCE_ACTION, self::NONCE_NAME, true, false) . '</p>
            <p><input type="hidden" name="custom_auth_action" value="register">
            <button type="submit" name="custom_auth_submit" value="1">Register</button></p>
        </form>';

        return $output;
    }

    public function render_login_form() {
        if (is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<p>You are already logged in. <a href="' . esc_url(wp_logout_url(home_url('/'))) . '">Logout</a></p>';
        }

        $message = isset($_GET['custom_auth_msg']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['custom_auth_msg'])) : '';
        $output = '';

        if ($message) {
            $output .= '<p>' . esc_html($message) . '</p>';
        }

        $output .= '<form method="post">
            <p><label>Username or Email<br><input type="text" name="custom_auth_login" required></label></p>
            <p><label>Password<br><input type="password" name="custom_auth_password" required></label></p>
            <p>' . wp_nonce_field(self::NONCE_ACTION, self::NONCE_NAME, true, false) . '</p>
            <p><input type="hidden" name="custom_auth_action" value="login">
            <button type="submit" name="custom_auth_submit" value="1">Login</button></p>
        </form>';

        return $output;
    }

    public function handle_forms() {
        if (!isset($_POST['custom_auth_submit'], $_POST['custom_auth_action'])) {
            return;
        }

        if (
            !isset($_POST[self::NONCE_NAME]) ||
            !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST[self::NONCE_NAME])), self::NONCE_ACTION)
        ) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('Invalid security token.');
        }

        $action = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['custom_auth_action']));

        if ($action === 'register') {
            $this->handle_registration();
        } elseif ($action === 'login') {
            $this->handle_login();
        }
    }

    private function handle_registration() {
        global $wpdb;

        $username = isset($_POST['custom_auth_username']) ? sanitize_user(wp_unslash($_POST['custom_auth_username'])) : '';
        $email = isset($_POST['custom_auth_email']) ? sanitize_email(wp_unslash($_POST['custom_auth_email'])) : '';
        $password = isset($_POST['custom_auth_password']) ? (string) wp_unslash($_POST['custom_auth_password']) : '';
        $password_confirm = isset($_POST['custom_auth_password_confirm']) ? (string) wp_unslash($_POST['custom_auth_password_confirm']) : '';

        if (!$username || !$email || !$password) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('All registration fields are required.');
        }

        if (!is_email($email)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('Invalid email address.');
        }

        if ($password !== $password_confirm) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('Passwords do not match.');
        }

        $table_name = $this->table_name();

        $existing = $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT id FROM {$table_name} WHERE user_login = %s OR user_email = %s LIMIT 1",
            $username,
            $email
        ));

        if ($existing) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('Username or email already exists.');
        }

        $hashed_password = wp_hash_password($password);

        $inserted = $wpdb->insert(
            $table_name,
            array(
                'user_login' => $username,
                'user_email' => $email,
                'user_pass'  => $hashed_password,
            ),
            array('%s', '%s', '%s')
        );

        if (!$inserted) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('Registration failed.');
        }

        $this->redirect_with_message('Registration successful. You can now log in.');
    }

    private function handle_login() {
        global $wpdb;

        $login = isset($_POST['custom_auth_login']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['custom_auth_login'])) : '';
        $password = isset($_POST['custom_auth_password']) ? (string) wp_unslash($_POST['custom_auth_password']) : '';

        if (!$login || !$password) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('All login fields are required.');
        }

        $table_name = $this->table_name();

        $user = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM {$table_name} WHERE user_login = %s OR user_email = %s LIMIT 1",
            $login,
            $login
        ));

        if (!$user || !wp_check_password($password, $user->user_pass)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('Invalid login credentials.');
        }

        $wp_user = get_user_by('login', $user->user_login);
        if (!$wp_user) {
            $user_id = wp_insert_user(array(
                'user_login' => $user->user_login,
                'user_email' => $user->user_email,
                'user_pass'  => $password,
            ));

            if (is_wp_error($user_id)) {
                $this->redirect_with_message('Unable to create WordPress user.');
            }

            $wp_user = get_user_by('id', $user_id);
        } else {
            wp_set_password($password, $wp_user->ID);
            $wp_user = get_user_by('id', $wp_user->ID);
        }

        wp_set_current_user($wp_user->ID);
        wp_set_auth_cookie($wp_user->ID, true);
        do_action('wp_login', $wp_user->user_login, $wp_user);

        $this->redirect_with_message('Login successful.');
    }

    public function handle_logout() {
        wp_logout();
        wp_safe_redirect(home_url('/'));
        exit;
    }

    private function redirect_with_message($message) {
        $redirect = wp_get_referer();
        if (!$redirect) {
            $redirect = home_url('/');
        }

        $redirect = add_query_arg('custom_auth_msg', rawurlencode($message), $redirect);
        wp_safe_redirect($redirect);
        exit;
    }
}

new Custom_User_Authentication_Plugin();
